title: Cryptool moves to mainnet this week
content_html:
The move from test server to mainnet happens this week.

Before the switch is flipped, the team is running one final round of pressure-testing on the Raise module. Anyone who wants to help can sign up on the test platform and run a small pool deposit with test tokens. Every test deposit helps confirm the system is ready for real traffic at scale.

Everyone who tests, in this round and in every earlier round, will be rewarded for their time. The step-by-step is in the testnet documentation on the Cryptool site.
author: Cryptool
